landing.heroSubtitle: B2B platform connecting suppliers with logistics companies
landing.supplierFeature2: Receive offers from multiple logistics companies
landing.logisticsFeature2: Submit offers for different transport types

presentation.heroSubtitle: A transparent, competitive, and innovative platform connecting suppliers and logistics companies
presentation.problemSupplier1: High prices and non-transparent tariffs for logistics services
presentation.problemSupplier2: Time-consuming and difficult comparison of offers
presentation.problemSupplier4: Difficulties in tracking shipments and knowing their status
presentation.problemLogistics1: High sales costs to find new customers
presentation.problemLogistics3: Lack of information about market prices and competitors
presentation.problemLogistics4: Problems with effective communication and customer management
presentation.solutionSubtitle: Our platform bridges suppliers and logistics companies, creating maximum value for both sides
presentation.supplierFeature1Desc: Save 20-40% on your logistics costs through competitive offers
presentation.supplierFeature2Desc: Create an announcement in a few minutes and automatically receive multiple offers
presentation.supplierFeature3Desc: Compare all offers side-by-side, see prices and delivery times
presentation.supplierFeature4Desc: Full control and budgeting with dashboard, reports, and CSV export
presentation.supplierFeature5Desc: Add multiple employees, manage announcements together, and track performance
presentation.supplierFeature6Desc: Track your shipment status at every stage - from booking to delivery
presentation.logisticsFeature1Desc: Access to 100+ daily cargo opportunities without a sales team
presentation.logisticsFeature2Desc: Submit offers with different transport types (Air/Sea/Rail/Road) for the same announcement
presentation.logisticsFeature3Desc: Win more contracts with competitive pricing and expand your business
presentation.logisticsFeature4Desc: Price analytics, win rate trends, and route specialization
presentation.logisticsFeature5Desc: Update shipment status at every stage, communicate through comments
presentation.logisticsFeature6Desc: Revenue, win rate, and CSV export by month, route, cargo type, and transport
presentation.step1Desc: Suppliers create announcements by specifying cargo details, route, and deadline
presentation.step2Desc: Logistics companies submit competitive offers for different transport types
presentation.step3Desc: Suppliers compare offers and select the most suitable one, and shipment begins
presentation.benefit1Desc: All companies are verified, audit trails and secure payment system
presentation.benefit2Desc: International business with 4 languages (AZ, EN, RU, TR) and multi-currency support
presentation.benefit3Desc: Fully optimized for iOS and Android, access from anywhere
presentation.techSubtitle: Reliable platform built with the latest technologies
presentation.ctaSubtitle: Join the LogiConnect family and revolutionize your logistics processes
presentation.ctaNote: Registration is free and fast. You can start immediately after admin approval.
presentation.featuresWalkthroughSubtitle: See every feature of LogiConnect and get familiar with practical examples
presentation.feature1Desc: Add multiple employees to your company, track their performance, and organize team work. Each employee can use the platform with their own login.
presentation.feature1Point1: Add multiple employees and assign roles (Admin/Employee)
presentation.feature1Point2: Performance statistics and reports for each employee
presentation.feature1Point3: Manage company profile and contact information
presentation.feature1Point4: Email invitation and automatic account creation
presentation.feature2Desc: Create a cargo announcement in 5 minutes and start receiving offers automatically from 100+ logistics companies. Simple and intuitive interface.
presentation.feature2Point1: Quick announcement creation with simple form (title, route, weight, volume)
presentation.feature2Point2: Accurate specification of cargo type, origin and destination points
presentation.feature2Point4: Announcement becomes immediately active and visible to logistics companies
presentation.feature3Desc: See all offers in one place, compare prices, and choose the most suitable transport type. Transparent and easy decision making.
presentation.feature3Point2: Sort by price, duration, and transport type
presentation.feature3Point3: Comment and discussion option for each offer
presentation.feature4Desc: Track your business with detailed reports and visual charts. See revenue, expenses, win rate, and more in real-time.
presentation.feature4Report1Desc: Announcements, offers, win rate, and revenue statistics
presentation.feature4Report2Desc: Performance changes over time and trend indicators
presentation.feature4Report3Desc: Revenue analysis by route, month, and transport type
presentation.feature4Report4Desc: Announcement, offer, and win rate statistics per employee
presentation.feature4Report5Desc: Download all data in Excel and CSV format
